arts.sum: Last week, it was revealed that Chelsea were in talks with 19-year-old Wolfsburg midfielder Kofi Amoako over a summer move despite the wealth of options already at the club and currently out on loan. Chelsea will hold talks with the agent of River Plate youngster Ian Subiabre next week, according to a report.
